title: The Jewel Pokémon [Cobblemon]
description: A Cobblemon datapack with Diancie implementation
body:
# The Jewel Pokémon
---

![diance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oZ3g4UdZ/images/e1dc49169815eebdc09fac3ecac146fcd247c84d.png)

This is an implementation of Jewel Pokémon line (**Carbink** and **Diancie**) for [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), assets for which are not in the mod yet.
Includes custom models with animations (movement, faint, sleep) and spawn distribution.


![e](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b92bba9405628cc301df4984ed4056966159480.gif)![x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/962cbf04563d5e8f17cb795b9ae427c5bc836e62.gif)![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oZ3g4UdZ/images/0894bc40a1668cb88262612d5a2714165ac7bb5b.gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oZ3g4UdZ/images/0894bc40a1668cb88262612d5a2714165ac7bb5b.gif)

Diancie shares the spawn pool with Carbink, albeit occupying a higher rarity bucket.

**Mega Diancie** currently acts as a reversible evolution that requires high Friendship and Nether Star to be held (Star is not consumed upon evolution.)
This is intended primarily for singleplayer use and is not balanced for multiplayer (most servers with Mega evo implementations are able to adapt the existing form themselves).

#### Installation: 

Throw the .zip into both datapacks and resourcepacks folder, don't forget to activate resourcepack to enable the models.

Things to come:
- Attack anims
